arts.ttl: Arsenal offered Randal Kolo Muani and Kingsley Coman to fix attacking issues but expensive fees and hefty wage demands scupper January deals
arts.sum: Arsenal are in the market for a forward but are unlikely to sign French duo Kolo Muani and Coman this month due to fee and wage demands.

arts.ttl: Midweek Warm-up: Poor squad planning at Bayern Munich led to another youth exit...are more on the horizon?; Borussia Dortmund looking to bolster squad; Throwing it back to The Strokes; and MORE!
arts.sum: Olise did so with ease and while his game is not perfect, it shows that players like Sané, Coman, and Gnabry are likely part of the reason why Bayern Munich went trophyless last season. Yup, one year from now, Bayern Munich could be looking at Sané, Gnabry, and Coman as primary parts of the sometimes stale attacking group.

arts.ttl: Mathys Tel Stats: Why Chelsea are prepared to lose Nkunku for teenage Bayern star
arts.sum: Christopher Nkunku’s Chelsea spell hasn’t quite gone as planned. The Frenchman spent a fair chunk of his debut season on the sidelines and has struggled to nail down a starting spot this t...

arts.ttl: How Chelsea would line up with Mathys Tel
arts.sum: The injury prone duo of Reece James and Wesley Fofana remain in Chelsea’s full strength starting XI, with Levi Colwill and Marc Cucurella expected to retain their places at Stamford Bridge. Enzo Fernandez and Moises Caicedo appear to have finally adapted to playing alongside each other, and will therefore keep their spots in central midfield, while Cole Palmer is still the shining light of Chelsea’s team.

arts.ttl: Liverpool, Real Madrid, Bayern…Nottingham Forest: the shock feat eight clubs have in common
arts.sum: When the 2024/25 Premier League season started in August last year, few would have foreseen a January game between Nottingham Forest and Liverpool being billed as a top-of-the-table clash . The year after being promoted from the English third tier under legendary manager Brian Clough in 1977, Nottingham Forest won their first ever English Division One title (the name for the top league at the time), making them the most recent promoted team to achieve that feat in England.

arts.ttl: Bayern München vs Hoffenheim preview: Bayern look to retain gap
arts.sum: Pace-setters Bayern München carry the aim of retaining their four-point gap to chasers Bayer Leverkusen as they host Hoffenheim at Allianz Arena on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich respond to Christopher Nkunku interest as Chelsea set asking price
arts.sum: Bayern Munich sporting director Christoph Freund responds to reports of interest in Chelsea's Christopher Nkunku.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich boss Vincent Kompany not looking past Hoffenheim
arts.sum: Bayern Munich coach Vincent Kompany was happy seeing his team take down Gladbach over the weekend, but is wary of playing a desperate Hoffenheim squad just a few days later. Finally, Kompany wanted to give credit to Bayern Munich midfielder, who the coach indicated has been making the most of his opportunity for more playing time.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich exec “determined” to get Chelsea’s Christopher Nkunku — cost could be €77 million
arts.sum: Bayern Munich ’s rumored interest in Chelsea FC attacker Christopher Nkunku appears to be legitimate. Meanwhile, Sky Sport journalist Florian Plettenberg (via @iMiaSanMia ) is reporting that Bayern Munich board member for sport Max Eberl is “determined” to get Nkunku:

arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: Christopher Nkunku asking price set as Bayern Munich plan January approach?
arts.sum: Chelsea allegedly set their asking price for Christopher Nkunku amid interest from Bundesliga giants Bayern Munich.
